name: 2026-worldcup-neil
description: World Cup probability analysis skill for daily forecasts, odds comparison, correct-score pools, EV screening, and responsible risk reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze World Cup fixtures with odds, score pools, EV, and risk notes
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to produce repeatable FIFA World Cup probability analysis, daily Beijing-time or U.S.-time forecast updates, market-implied probability comparisons, Poisson correct-score pools, expected-value screening, and responsible risk reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use $world-cup-probability-model to analyze the next World Cup matchday.
